name: typedown-vscode
description: vscode extension providing lsp services for the typedown language
author: Huy-DNA <huydo862003@gmail.com>

scripts.compile: pnpm run check-types && pnpm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: pnpm run check-types && pnpm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: pnpm run compile-tests && pnpm run compile && pnpm run lint
scripts.build:rust: cargo build -p typedown-lsp && TYPEDOWN_BINARY_SOURCE=local node scripts/setup-binary.mjs
scripts.watch:rust: cargo watch --workdir ../.. -w crates -s "cargo build -p typedown-lsp && TYPEDOWN_BINARY_SOURCE=local node editors/vscode/scripts/setup-binary.mjs"
scripts.compile:dev: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run compile
scripts.compile:staging: pnpm run fetch:staging && pnpm run compile
